name: Staff of the Adder
description:
As a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can turn the head of this staff into that of an animate, venomous snake for 1 minute or revert the staff to its inanimate form.
When you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action, you can make one of the attack rolls using the animated snake head, which has a reach of 5 feet. Apply your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} and Wisdom modifier to the attack roll. On a hit, the target takes {@damage 1d6} Piercing damage and {@damage 3d6} Poison d
